"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, "__esModule", { value: true }); exports.pairwise = void 0; var lift_1 = require("../util/lift"); var OperatorSubscriber_1 = require("./OperatorSubscriber"); function pairwise() { return lift_1.operate(function (source, subscriber) { var prev; var hasPrev = false; source.subscribe(OperatorSubscriber_1.createOperatorSubscriber(subscriber, function (value) { var p = prev; prev = value; hasPrev && subscriber.next([p, value]); hasPrev = true; })); }); } exports.pairwise = pairwise; //# sourceMappingURL=pairwise.js.map
